GEOG672 Biophysics of Optical Remote Sensing (3 Credits)

Biophysical principles, phenomena and processes underlying multispectral remote sensing in the optical portion of the EM spectrum. Includes computer-based exercises that explore the biophysical basis of land patterns and dynamics observed in remote sensing data. Prerequisite: GEOG472; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department; or permission of BSOS- Geography department.
